items.title: Oil prices hit $100 for the first time since May
items.summary: The price of Brent crude rose more than 6% on Thursday as the war in the Middle East continues to escalate.

items.title: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
items.summary: The US president says the landmark agreement to help Saudis develop nuclear energy is dependent on it joining the Abraham Accords.

items.title: France evacuates 20,000 as wildfires spread in south-west
items.summary: Most of those evacuated were tourists from campsites around Arcachon Bay in France's Gironde region.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 4共和黨人倒戈！美眾院要求川普停止出兵伊朗 參院數小時後翻盤
items.summary: 本月23日，由共和黨主導的美國聯邦眾議院通過1項決議案，要求總統川普停止對伊朗的軍事行動，除非他獲得國會批准；但同天數小時後，聯邦參議院否決了另一項類似的決議案。  路透報導...…

items.title: 川普證實習近平9月24日訪美 將聚焦「這議題」
items.summary: 美國總統川普23日表示，當中國國家主席習近平9月24日訪問美國時，他將與習近平討論人工智慧（AI）議題。  路透報導，在習近平此次訪問之前，兩人已於今年稍早在北京會面。川...…

items.title: 產油大國竟求援！烏無人機重創煉油廠 俄被迫進口印度汽油
items.summary: 首次上稿 00:51更新時間 05:50  由於烏克蘭無人機攻擊摧毀了境內主要煉油廠的部分設施，俄羅斯被迫進口汽油，並即將接收一批來自印度的燃油，凸顯俄國燃油短缺的嚴重程...…
